title: Fresh Buckets VR
description: Resource pack that adds 3D bucket models tailored for Vivecraft!
body:
# Fresh Buckets for Vivecraft

**A port of [Fresh Buckets](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-buckets) by Cyber, made visually compatible with [Vivecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft).**

---

## 📗 About the Original Pack

> *This pack replaces all default bucket textures with detailed 3D models. On Minecraft 1.21.5 and above, axolotl buckets now feature unique textures based on their in-game variants. On Minecraft 1.21.6 and above, axolotl, fish and tadpole buckets are animated for an even more immersive experience! Perfect for adding depth and realism without straying from the vanilla style.*

---

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2c908ddaa052bba9227f6e820755705cafc7eca_0.webp)

---

## ⬇️ Pack Options
* Recommended to install [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) to toggle 3d dropped item models along with animations.
* For 1.20.1, 1.21, 1.21.1 you need [Pommel](https://modrinth.com/mod/pommel-held-item-models) installed otherwise it will not work. 
**On Forge and NeoForge for those versions, [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) must be installed as well.**

---

## 🥽 Vivecraft Compatibility

This version ensures all custom bucket models are rendered correctly in **Vivecraft's VR environment**, maintaining full immersion while using and holding buckets.

---
